entry.title: Re: SAP Exception while calling RFC from .NET MVC Framework.
entry.content: Please check with SAP Support (notes or message). NB: the error about Just-In-Time debugger is something not related to SAP.

entry.title: Three Takeaways from ASUG Research: Challenges and Opportunities for Efficient SAP Implementations
entry.content:
Here are the three key takeaways from this year's research:

1. People are at the heart of transformation. 

The core message of our presentation was that people are still the linchpin of any successful business transformation. Organizations are motivated to transform primarily to enhance operations, and this involves empowering their workforce. Understanding and addressing the human aspect of change management is vital for a successful transformation, particularly as research respondents who cited change management as a challenge spiked to 58% in 2023 (from 43% in 2022). 

Another standout issue was the skills gap, which includes the lack of essential skills, inadequate skills, or a shortage of skills and its hinderance on organizational transformation efforts. The top three missing skills identified in the research were SAP S/4HANA expertise, business process transformation, and training and onboarding management. Organizations are grappling with learning on the job or relying on external resources to fill these crucial skill gaps.

2. Set milestones and benchmarks to maintain commitment.

While numerous potential benefits can be gained from a business transformation, the research emphasized that these benefits take time to materialize. Organizations should maintain their commitment to the journey, even when immediate results may not be apparent. A long-term perspective is essential for realizing the full potential of transformation initiatives. A key insight from the research was that nearly half of respondents required more than six months to start to realize the benefits of a business transformation.

3. Unlock the potential of business process management. 

The research revealed that business process management tools are underutilized resources in the pursuit of transformation benefits. Organizations can harness the power of these tools to streamline processes, enhance collaboration, and drive efficiencies. Recognizing the value of such tools is critical for optimizing the benefits of transformation efforts.

ASUG conducted this research in June 2023. The results are based on responses from 148 participants who are members of ASUG.

entry.title: Re: Content Repository Migration in mind ?
entry.content:
Thanks for the very helpful blog.

I've used a modified version of Z_MIGRATE_ARCHIVELINK before with good effect to migrate over 3.5 million files from a FileNet system to a SAP DMS. I now need to migrate a smaller number (crica 20K files) of KPro/DMS/HTTP content server documents from the FileNet system into a new repository on the SAP DMS system.

I had found RSIRPIRL already but don't like the idea of a program that actually deletes things in case it makes an error. Looking at Z_DOC_COPY that had the advantage that it doesn't delete anything in the source system in case there is a problem. Does it also update ECC at the same time to change the link from the old backend to the new one?

entry.title: Re: Consume external OData as Batch Request
entry.content: What do you mean by "batch request" ? And how would you call SAP OData API? I am trying to understand what you are trying to do (or where is the problem) 🙂

entry.title: Sap material
entry.content:
Hi In Sap for material master have created one material but in select views fields some fields not showing like sales organisation 1 and 2. How to add or replace it. Can anyone suggest me

 

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Sap B1 Patch 2311 sluggish and slowing down system
entry.content:
We have installed and tested 2402 HotFix1.
After a few days now I can confirm that issues are solved (GDI objects constantly increasing in Themed mode when windows are small or minimized).

Beware though, 2402 re-awakened an old issue that was resolved in prior versions: when clicking on the 'Inventory Data' tab in Item Master Data, the app immediatly crashes.

I'll create a new topic for this.

entry.title: Re: SAC message UQM_OPTIMIZED_USER_FRIENDLY_PERFORMANCE
entry.content: Unfortunately NO

entry.title: S/4HANA 2023 FPS00 Upgrade
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS00 - Technical Upgrade and Approach

I would like to share our experience with S/4HANA 2023 upgrade, where we had opportunity to upgrade one of customer S/4HANA 2020 FPS02 landscape to 2023 FPS00 version recently. 

SAP considers the 2023 version of SAP S/4HANA to become a “go-to-version”, as it will deliver the next step of product maturity and concluding with major overhauls. In consideration of this important next step, SAP is offering customers choice regarding the how and when they want to upgrade to SAP S/4HANA 2023

What's New Viewer - ABAP Platform

https://help.sap.com/whats-new/6a9ccc848f4047178da63fe4eaa86d50?Version=ABAP%20Platform%202023&locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/doc/b870b6ebcd2e4b5890f16f4b06827064/2023.000/en-US/WN_OP2023_EN.pdf

Key updates and information:

  1. Next-generation Technology, Compatible with Legacy System:

SAP S/4HANA will provide customers with advanced technologies that will further enhance business areas

 

The many new features of SAP S/4HANA 2023 lie in the compatibility scope of SAP’s legacy software. This updated environment provides better opportunities for continued innovation without disrupting ongoing operations and prepares companies for the desired time to move to the cloud.

2214409 - SAP S/4HANA: Compatible Add-Ons

  1. SAP S/4HANA will change to a two-year release cycle and  A longer seven years of mainstream maintenance per release:

SAP S/4HANA releases prior to release 2023 follow a yearly cycle, i.e. every year there is a major release for SAP S/4HANA. Every release has a five-year mainstream maintenance phase after which it enters the customer-specific maintenance phase.

Starting from SAP S/4HANA 2023, SAP plans to deliver a new major release every two years and mainstream maintenance will be extended from five to seven years.

3307222 - SAP S/4HANA 2023: Release Information Note

Upgrade Information

  • You can upgrade from SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1511, SAP S/4HANA 1610, SAP S/4HANA 1709, SAP S/4HANA 1809, SAP S/4HANA 1909, SAP S/4HANA 2020, SAP S/4HANA 2021 or SAP S/4HANA 2022 to SAP S/4HANA 2023.
  • The Zero Downtime Option (ZDO) of SUM is general available with SUM 2.0 and released for upgrades from start release SAP S/4HANA 2020 and higher, as well as for Feature Pack / Support Package updates on SAP S/4HANA release 2020 and higher.

Conversion Information

  • System conversions are supported from SAP ERP 6.0 to SAP Enhancement Package 8 for SAP ERP 6.0.
    • SAP NetWeaver 7.0 SP17
    • The minimum Support Package level of the underlying SAP NetWeaver release for running a system conversion to SAP S/4HANA needs to be:

 

S/4HANA Upgrade high level steps:

1. Pre-Upgrade tasks, tools and Maintenance Planner etc

  • SAP Readiness Check for Upgrades
  • 3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades

  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA – Note Analyzer Input File | SAP Blogs

    Note: The revamped Note assistant is not a mandate - 3051466 - Note Assistant Made Easy : Revamped Note Assistant.

After the latest version of Notes are downloaded and if we refresh the Note Analyzer result screen, the status of the notes may change in accordance with the latest version. The Action column now indicates “Implement”. Implemented all the notes in Development System and transport into subsequent systems.

Run the readiness check report in Production system

once batch job is complete, download the analysis data and upload into readiness check  

2. SAP Custom Code Checks (Run in Development system)

2655768 - Custom Code Analyzer - The where-used list index for customer objects is not up to date

once batch job is complete, download the analysis data and upload into readiness check  

3. SAP Maintenance Planner

 

4. Add-on uninstallation

5. Simplification Item Checks

6. SAP HANA Database upgrade

 

7. SAP S/4HANA 2023 Upgrade (SUM)

Following SAP Note 2538858 - Error in SUM phase LANG_SELECT: "Could not find suitable DVDs for product ERP required for the procedure" - SAP for Me.

Perfrom SPDD modification in 000 client

 

3004812 - S4TWL - FSBP table Additional Partner Numbers (BPID001) is obsolete - SAP for Me

1556353 - BP_AID: Checklist for migration of "Additional Partner Numbers" - SAP for Me

Follow the SAP Notes. As mentioned, there are entries in BPDI001 in client 100.

1705774 - Error in phases MAIN_SWITCH/JOB_RSVBCHCK2 or MAIN_SWITCH/JOB_RSVBCHCK_D; Checks after phase MAIN_INIT/JOB_RSVBCHCK* were negative. - SAP for Me

 

 

Important SAP notes:

S/4HANA 2023 release information SAP notes:

3307222 - SAP S/4HANA 2023: Release Information Note - SAP for Me
3351047 - SAP S/4HANA 2023 Feature Package Stack 00: Additional Release Information

3306766 - SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2023: Release Information Note

3348949 - SAP S/4HANA 2023: Restriction note

2655761 - SAP S/4HANA - restrictions and recommendations regarding specific revisions of SAP HANA database for use in SAP S/4HANA
3340515 - SAP S/4HANA 2023 - application specific notes in system conversion / release upgrade preparation phase

3347591 - Java components for S/4HANA 2023 – Restrictions

3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades - SAP for Me

SAP HANA 2.0 Database related SAP Notes:

2777782 - SAP HANA DB: Recommended OS Settings for RHEL 8

2235581 - SAP HANA: Supported Operating Systems

Operating System related SAP Notes:

3119751 - Linux Requirements for SAP Kernel 754 and for SAP Kernel 788 and higher

2871484 - SAP supported variants of Red Hat Enterprise Linux

1631106 - Red Hat Enterprise Linux for SAP Applications

2526952 - Red Hat Enterprise Linux for SAP Solutions

Thank you.

Pratap

entry.title: Corresponding CDS view for 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR datasource
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please let me know the Corresponding CDS view for 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR datasource. 

Until now I am using 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR datasource which was enhanced with few custom fields and replicated the 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR datasource to BW.

Now, I would like to replace this 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR datasource with a cds view and join with my own cds view (which is having enhanced fields). 

I found cds view - P_EmployeeAllAttribs [ sql view : PEMPLOYEEALLATTR ], but it is not exactly same.

Please let me know the CDS which has same fields as 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR datasource. 

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Signavio Extraktion is giving different number of rows back
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I currently have a problem in the Make to Stock process that I want to map in Signavio. I am missing individual events in a case or cases are not even available in Signavio. There is no recognizable pattern, meaning it is not always a specific event that is missing or an order type.

Due to the fact that there is no pattern, I suspect the problem is in the data extraction. I looked at the AFKO and AFPO tables and found that if I delete the data from the table completely and extract it again, I get a different number of rows extracted (see screenshot). I have not changed the extraction code.

If I get a different number of rows extracted with each extraction, it also makes sense that events are missing

Does anyone have an idea what the cause is?


Regards
Niels

entry.title: Re: Source of supply handling for maintenance orders
entry.content:
Hi Gabor,

Appreciate the detailed blogpost. 

We have implemented all the pre-requisites mentioned in your blog and the SAP Note. We tested with compatibility mode and we can see the source of supply is determined in the work order(info record for non stock material), however if enhanced mode is used which is what we would prefer (for lean service procurement) the source of supply determination does not work. 

Is there a way that both source of supply determination and enhanced procurement mode can work together? 

BR,

Sneh

entry.title: Steps to Deactivate Data Volume Management for a managed system
entry.content:
We need to deactivate Data Volume Management completely and in the proper way.

We are looking for the proper procedure, in case we will reactivate the scenario again in the future.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Steps to Deactivate Data Volume Management for a mana...
entry.content:
Deactivating Data Volume Management (DVM) for a managed system involves a few steps:

Delete or de-activate the DVM extractors

  1. Go to the extractor framework via transaction E2E_EFWK_LV
  2. Click the column 'Name' and select 'User-defined filter' to set custom filters.
  3. Select filter option 'Setup Type' and choose value 'DVM'.
  4. Filter the System ID for the relevant managed system.
  5. Select the extractors and click 'Delete' or 'Deactivate'. (Note: If you expect to use DVM for this managed system in the future, deactivation is advised, rather than deletion.)

Deactivate any scheduled DVM analyses

  1. Enter the Data Volume Management setup scenario via transaction SOLMAN_SETUP
  2. Go to step 4 and choose the relevant managed system and client
  3. Proceed to step 7, and click 'Edit'
  4. Select the processing mode which is active (Frequency is configured)
  5. Click the 'Expert Mode' link
  6. Hover over the 'Job Scheduling Frequency' value, and select the input help button
  7. Choose frequency 'None' and click OK, then Save. (Note: the processing mode will continue to display as 'Weekly', as this is the default frequency. The recent changes will be saved and no reports will be generated after setting the frequency to 'None'.)

De-active DVM data collection in EarlyWatch Alert

  1. Execute transaction SOLMAN_SETUP, and enter the EarlyWatchAlert Management scenario (listed under Application Operations)
  2. In step 1, search for and select the relevant managed system
  3. Go directly to step 6.3 - Data Volume Management
  4. Click 'Edit', select the client and uncheck the 'DVM Active' checkbox.
  5. Click Save. 

Detailed steps with accompanying screenshots are also available in SAP KBA 3042932 - How to deactivate Data Volume Management for a particular system

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field in request material mdg fiori...

entry.title: Re: CR during runtime showing nothing
entry.content: Hi Don, thank you for your reply.

entry.title: Patch 2402 and 2402 HF1 cause crash in 'Item Master Data' 'Inventory Data' tab.
entry.content:
When clicking on the 'Inventory Data' tab in Item Master Data, the app immediatly crashes and creates a dump.

We had been experiencing this before and found the issue to be resolved in 2311. 
2402 reintroduced the crash - pity.

The crash happens without apparent relation to the data, type of item, inventory level or any other definition we looked at and is immediate when clicking the tab. Strange, quality control should have noticed this easily.

Maybe somebody out there has more experience with the issue since it was already present in prior months.

entry.title: Re: SAP FI-CA: Integration with FI
entry.content:
Nicely done.

There is also the possbility to set a flag on the position level if the position should not be cummulated.

Does anybody know where I can define which attributes are to be used for the split?

entry.title: Re: Correct amortization passed mistakenly on an auc
entry.content:
hi 

if you run afab in test mode change asset data.

if you run afab in real mode you have to finish configuration and post amortization in restart option. change asset data and run afab in repeating option this undo amortyzation.

entry.title: Re: CR during runtime showing nothing
entry.content: Hi Don thank you for your reply , i read the details given in the link, as you have asked few thing i will reply to that. Its a desktop application and same sort of configuration i have on my laptop with Win11 OS. But CR runs perfectly on my laptop, it opens quickly as expected. There are no issues related to Anti Virus, permissions, to folder and other. Also before updating it was running perfectly and showing report instantly. I have not installed , also i would like to ask, in this version i added 3-4 new parameters , does because of that can be the problem. Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am Amrit, super excited to join community officially. I have been following SAP community since many years. I started my career as ABAP developer and then moved to SAP CRM as techno-functional role especially for Utilities Industry. Looking forward to great interactions here specifically on my topics of interest - SAP CX and Cloud-OP integrations. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Form Cell Header reference
entry.content:
Hi @Jitendra_Kansal ,

Here is my page metadata,

{
	"Controls": [
		{
			"FilterFeedbackBar": {
				"ShowAllFilters": false,
				"_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
			},
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
			"_Name": "SectionedTable0",
			"Sections": [
				{
					"ObjectHeader": {
						"DetailImageIsCircular": false,
						"HeadlineText": "Hours",
						"StatusPosition": "Stacked",
						"StatusImagePosition": "Leading",
						"SubstatusImagePosition": "Leading"
					},
					"_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectHeader",
					"_Name": "SectionObjectHeader0",
					"Visible": true
				},
				{
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": false,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"Controls": [						
						{
							"Value": "",
							"_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.DatePicker",
							"_Name": "Allocation1StartTimePicker",
							"IsVisible": true,
							"Separator": true,
							"Caption": "$(L,'startTime')",
							"IsEditable": true,
							"Mode": "Time"
						}
					],
					"Header": {
						"_Name": "Allocation1SectionHeader",
						"AccessoryType": "None",
						"UseTopPadding": true,
						"Items": [
							{
								"_Type": "SectionHeaderItem.Type.Label",
								"_Name": "Allocation1SectionHeaderItemLabel",
								"Visible": true,
								"Position": "Left",
								"Title": "$(L,'allocation_1')"
							},
							{
								"_Name": "Allocation1SectionHeaderItemTypeButton",
								"Title": "$(L,'button_save')",
								"ButtonType": "Text",
								"Semantic": "Tint",
								"ImagePosition": "Leading",
								"Visible": true,
								"Enabled": true,
								"Position": "Right",
								"_Type": "SectionHeaderItem.Type.Button"
							}
						]
					},
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false
					},
					"_Type": "Section.Type.FormCell",
					"_Name": "Allocation1FormCell"
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"DesignTimeTarget": {
		"Service": "",
		"EntitySet": ""
	},
	"_Type": "Page",
	"_Name": "DetailView",
	"Caption": "DetailView",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

entry.title: Re: Demystifying Joule - SAP´s New Generative AI Assistant
entry.content: thanks, good stuff

entry.title: RAP unmanaged entity in a managed behavior definition
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to include an existing BDEF into another.

I'm trying to create a generic Address object that I can use in multiple BOs:

The /RHP/R_Address has its behavior definition, I'd like to link it from /RHP/R_Location.

I could create an unmanaged association so I could create from the Location entity

unmanaged association _Address { create ( features : global ); with draft; }

In the corresponding methods, I read and create from the Location entity.

The problem with this approach is that the Service Binding doesn't support unmanaged draft

And if I remove the draft option I've got another error in the Maintenance Object

I also tried specifying it as a foreign entity, but it only works to include the entity in the results (failed, mapping)

foreign entity /RHP/R_Address alias Address;

Another option I'd like to test is to create an unmanaged entity (/RHP/R_LocationAddress) inside /RHP/R_Location so I can redefine create, update, and delete methods to call internally /RHP/R_Address by EML.

Can someone help me to manage the /RHP/R_Address from /RHP/R_Location?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Error in a service of application MMPUR Function not possible for a contract
entry.content:
When sending legacy Ariba contract CLID to external ERP SAP ECC, i am getting this error, "

Error in a service of application MMPUR Function not possible for a contract

Message No. ARBCIG_MESSAGE010"

entry.title: Re: Clarification: Condition Contract Accruals for Sales...
entry.content:
Hi Tim, 

For Condition contract, accruals can be posted: 

- via billing document, but the amount can’t be changed or recalculated after posting 

- via Delta accrual, specific settlement document type to post accrual outside billing document and using cumulative approach. 

- using both billing document and delta accrual. In that case accrual will be posted most of the time via billing document but if rate, period of validity, selection criteria changes and you want to have the correct amount of accrual recalculated then you have to execute a delta accrual

Regards,

Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: Analytical List Page ALP : Scale for Measures Integer...
entry.content: Did you get solution to it? As I am also looking for the same.

entry.title: Re: 360 Evaluation - Competency Library
entry.content:
Hello, 

First question: does your customer have TIH enabled? If yes, is the Growth Portfolio enabled also? If no, have they set a proficiency rating scale yet? 

In the 360 Review forms, it is possible to grant permission for the employee to select which goals and/or competencies to include in the assessment (from the Center of Competencies or TIH), and whether the goals and/or competencies contain a rating + comments, or just a comment section. It's important to note that you cannot configure different options within a single section (for example you cannot have only a rating for one goal, and only a comment for another goal). For goals you need to agree on one unified configuration, and for competencies you can have a different configuration, should the customer prefer it. 


For asking questions, I would suggest setting up a dedicated competency-type section, with only comments (text box) made visible and editable, no ratings. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Consume external OData as Batch Request
entry.content:
Hi @Tomas_Buryanek - thanks for your quick response.

I want to put together several OData operations into one HTTP request. That's why I thought of the OData batch, as it's only one POST request containing multiple Odata requests. As written, it would work to put this together "manually" and parse the result, but maybe there's a much nice way in the ABAP framework.

entry.title: Re: BW4HANA Views catalog
entry.content: You can try to query the tables and views of schema _SYS_BIC.

entry.title: Email not received yet

entry.title: SAP Business Process Automation - 6VW - condition types and values
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to do mass upload of POs via excel using SAP Business Process Automation and scope 6VW. However, the excel file related to this process is missing some fields which we need to be included (custom pricing condition type and their values).

Could you please advise if it is possible to amend the excel file and add the missing fields, so POs are created with mentioned details?

Thank you in advance.

Martina

entry.title: Re: CloudEvents at SAP 🌁
entry.content:
@ajmaradiaga According to SAP Discovery Center (https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/serviceCatalog/event-mesh) the SAP Event Mesh service is no longer available. I did not find any more information on why that is and also, more important, what is the alternative?

Since SAP Event Broker still doesn't seem to support BTP-applications built by partners and customers... how can I do event-driven design with a S/4HANA Cloud System and a custom BTP extension developed with CAP, for example?

entry.title: Re: Lançamentos com MIRO valor zero e MIGO com valor
entry.content:
A questão é bem antiga, então creio que já deve ter sido solucionada.

Neste caso, é bem provável que o tipo de material que estava sendo adquirido fosse um material que atualiza apenas quantidade de estoque e não valor, por isso que na entrada da MIGO não há contabilização.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Data Action Advance Formula
entry.content:
@akhilgs

I have my percentage stored only in jan 2024 but I have to multiply it with the total (full 2024) of 500200 gl Monthly salary how can i achieve this with the advanced formula. Thanks

entry.title: Re: TABLE CONTROLS IN MODULE POOL - modifying and editing
entry.content:
Use 'REFRESH IT_DATA' before select query for IT_DATA.
Where IT_DATA is your Internal Table for Output.

entry.title: Re: BW/4 conversion: Export datasources 8* - can it delet...
entry.content:
Hi
if those are really still in use depends on the technology you use to load the data to another BW:
Via ODP: then those 8* Datasoures are not required any more
via  export DataSource (8*RSDS): then of course those objects are still in use.

My recommendation is leave those 8* for the first and work on all other tasks required to get the system into B4H mode. Why? Normally the transfer to CUBE/ODSO to ADSO will remove those export DataSources by default. Or if you delete old unused CUBE/ODSOs, then also thier 8* ExportRSDS should be deleted.
From my experience there will still be some 8* objects in the end which you then have to delete manually. 

But a converversion from 3.x to 7.x is normally not required.

hope that helps
Frank

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Welcome @AmritVader - great that you are already so experienced and knowledgeable on many SAP topics - you will certainly benefit from the knowledge exchange within SAP Community. Be sure to "subscribe" to the SAP Managed Tags for those areas of interest.

Have you already heard of Devtoberfest? Since you're from a development background, you might be interested to check out this contest that will start later in the year once again!

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
Hi @helenekunz 

thanks for your comment - hm, it has some similarity but I am not sure - If I do a html analysis for the website I cannot find "successfactors" or "rmk" so I believe more it is a custom / own development.

We are currently implementing it with two customers. Hope to be live by june or july. I will keep you posted

@michelejurume

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting: Custom fields not included in data r...
entry.content:
I know on an earlier release - maybe 1909 - I had to enhance either the CDS view or ABAP dynamic SQL to have the custom fields loaded from ACDOCP.  It might be worth checking help.sap.com or debugging to see if this is indeed supported, otherwise just reviewing the Custom Fields and Logic app setting and make sure you've extended it to all the apps or business scenarios that could be relevant.

Chris

entry.title: SAC and SharePoint connection
entry.content:
What is the best practice to share the SharePoint connection to users in SAC?

Is it possible to setup a universal SharePoint connection to a specific top SharePoint folder in the way that users having rights to use that connection won't have access to the whole content of that folder but only to folders shared with them within the top folder?

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!

Sure, I will check the topic you mentioned. Thank you once again.

entry.title: SAP EWM Batch Management, Decentralised EWM
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for batch management in EWM side, tested with manual creation of batch management and my IBD taken batch management number from internal number range as per configuration and updated ECC.

But business have 3 or 4 products with different combination of numeric and alpha numeric series batch numbers and same should be scan when doing GR in ewm side.

what will be the best solution for my issue.

TIA

V.

EWM - Basic Functions  MAN Batch Management

Hello,

Event name - SAP Build CodeJam

entry.title: Binance Referans Kodu: UL2M4EB8
entry.content: Binance Referans Kodu: UL2M4EB8 - use code (UL2M4EB8)Güncel dönemde Binance referans kodu olarak UL2M4EB8 kodunu kullanabilirsiniz. Bu kod %20 ile en yüksek komisyon indirimi sağlar. Bunun yanında 600$ hoş geldin bonusu hediye!

entry.title: Data services job taking 6-9 Hrs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

A recurring jobs running for every 4 hours. But each of it's execution took 6 to 9 Hrs to complete successfully. Because of this, many times some executions are running in parallel i.e., if one execution not finished in 4 Hrs , then the next execution will start after 4 Hrs so there will be  2 executions runs in parallel which could impact performane as well as end user not getting data on time. So kindly suggest on this.

Regards

Siba

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: 7c4e3b9db28118adb387e7f1d36a798ba1f54e8ed3544bc67db0499ae11424c5

entry.title: SAP & Outsystems - Call custom function module
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I'm trying to call a custom function module that I've created in a SAP system from Outsystems, but the function does not appear in the Outsystems menu when i try to test it. 

Here in this client, they've another machine were they can call some functions from SAP as you can see in the print: 

 

Can someone help me understand what I might be doing wrong?

Or I'm thinking in the wrong way and this is not possible?

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: How to call a Rest API in a Fiori App and show the result in a List
entry.content:
I want to develop a Fiori App which i can later add to the Fiori Launchpad. The App should call a REST API, and the result of the API should be displayed as a list in the Fiori App. 

I did create a few Fiori Apps with the SAP Tutorials, like this one https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-fiori-app-purchase-req.html 

All the tutorials i completed used eclipse to create Services, which i can access from SAP Business Application Studio. I understand that these Services in Eclipse are so called CDS Views, which only show Data from a Database. Can i also show Data from a API in these CDS Views or do i need to use another Technology for my requirement?

The Fiori App should work in an On-Premise System and in the ABAP-Cloud.

entry.title: Dangerous Goods Check for Transportation with Product Compliance in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Product Compliance in SAP S/4HANA comprises of :

  • Product Marketability and Chemical Compliance
  • Safety Data Sheet and Label Management
  • Dangerous Goods Management

(Help documentation SAP S/4HANA -> Enterprise Business Applications -> R&D / Engineering -> Product Compliance)

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/35751be3d6ee423197492574e016a512/679a1d3744d34b43832da6890b9095c0.html?locale=en-US

 From the point of view of Transportation, Dangerous Goods Management is the focus as it deals with classifying products according to dangerous goods regulations and the dangerous goods data which is integrated into sales, delivery and transportation processes, where the information is used for transport compliance checks.

Dangerous Goods Check in Transportation Management can also be done based on Product Safety & Stewardship (PS&S) functionality. 

Few vital points to remember when using Product Compliance based Dangerous Goods Checks:

  • What is transported is a "Packaged Product" (in Product compliance there is a separation of Unpackaged and Packaged product)
  • Transport Regulations (example ADR, RID, ADN, IATA, IMDG, etc..) which are mode-of-transport specific and the countries party to those regulations decide if or not the Packed Product is transported

Some important Business Roles are:

Role Description

SAP_BR_PRODSTWRD_SPLST_PCLProduct Stewardship Specialist – Product Compliance
SAP_BR_MD_SPECIALIST_PCLMaster Data Specialist – Product Compliance
SAP_BR_DG_SPLST_PCLDangerous Goods Specialist – Product Compliance

Identifying Material as "relevant" for Compliance Check

This needs to be done in the "Manage Product Master Data" App.

Inbuilt workflow will initiate a request to manage "Basic compliance data of the Unpackaged/Packaged Product"

Here the important information about the Compliance Purposes is stored. Compliance Purpose includes the different Regulations which would be applied. Here one needs to be aware of the Regulations for different modes of transport and the respective geographies.

Below is an example of Product from Transportation point of view

 

 In next step the DG classification and Transport permissions needs to be maintained which is also called as the Classification of Product

As shown below, once you know the UN Classification of your product, all related information is readily available from the system and is auto-filled (Phrases

App "Compliance Information of Products" presents the maintained information, this app can be used by business users

 

 

Transportation Process view:

Sales Order provides information on the Dangerous Goods checks in the form of item and header "Status".

  Related Freight Unit provides the same in the form of "Blocks" and item "Status" 

 

 Delivery document created also makes the DG Checks based on countries and Mode-of-Transports involved in Transportation

 On Transportation Management side the "Actual" mode of Transport can be changed during the Execution Document Creation, at this point in time the Compliance Checks are performed again and necessary blocks are applied.

Happy Reading !!!

 

Note:  I have demonstrated the functionality in this blog post using system screen images with relevant data for ease of understanding for the readers. It should be noted that these screens and the data is from SAP’s internal test systems and has no relation to any external source

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData

entry.title: Re: Project roles vs Authorization roles in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: can you please also let us know how to create custom roles for users, for example i want to assign access to users for creating TOC in the cloud ALM and also moving the original transport to Quality system but i want him to restrict to move TR to production. is it possible with authorization control in cloud ALM ?

entry.title: EC Job Info - custom field for Compensation portlet
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can provide for our managers access to the Compensation portlet. For this case we would use a custom field from Job Info portlet (*Manager has salary access containing values like yes/no) which would need to trigger the access to the Compensation Information portlet. 

If you had any requirements for creating business rule which can support for the cross portlets access, I would appreciate your recommendations.  

Best regards,

Eli

Hello,

If we use Pull Task API to get tasks from Jira to CALM. How we could create connection from Jira side to CALM? Could we use BTP for this connection or should we use Integration Suite? 

Br Leena

entry.title: Re: Dynamic calendar view in SAC

entry.title: Re: Password Encrypted Mail triggering with PDF attachment for HR payslip (Customised.)
entry.content:
DATA: O_ENCRYPT_AES TYPE REF TO /GRUBE/CL_PDF_ENCRY_AES_256.
DATA: O_ENCRYPT TYPE REF TO /GRUBE/CL_PDF_ENCRYPTION.                                                        This two classes gives an Error on Sap S4, where are they defined.

Please Help.

entry.title: Re: IBM Security Guardium
entry.content:
You are going to have to check the IBM documentation to find out what databases their product supports. This page mentions supporting "Sybase" which could refer to old versions of SAP ASE or possibly old versions of SAP IQ.

https://www.ibm.com/products/ibm-guardium-data-protection

In a quick look I didn't see any references to "SAP" on the IBM Security Guardian web pages I looked at.

entry.title: Re: Patch 2402 and 2402 HF1 cause crash in 'Item Master Data' 'Inventory Data' tab.
entry.content:
We are still running pl 2111, and I never experienced this issue. Your post is the first time I have heard of it.

Are you running any addons?

Do you use formatted searches on the Inventory tab?

Have you used the UI editing function to move fields to or from the Inventory tab?

Does this happen on all clients on all machines (including the server, if you are running your own hardware), and to all users?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
Hi,

8bd633792da74f3a01b5c38e27ef9385ba061811c0feaa88c0e3d25015d0bb78

 

Formula for stringtoHash:

STRING('$' +FORMAT_LOCALIZED_DECIMAL(SUM(MAP(GENERATE_RANGE(0, 19),NUMBER(data.A_SalesOrderItem1[item].NetAmount))), "en-IN", 2))

Formula for Chart :

MAP(GENERATE_RANGE(0, 5) ,{x: data.A_SalesOrderItem1[item].Material, y: NUMBER(data.A_SalesOrderItem1[item].NetAmount)})

Please check the attached screenshot below and provide guidance.

Thanks and Regards,

     Abhijeet

Have a look here.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic calendar view in SAC
entry.content: Hi @eeddggaarr , thanks for your response. I did look at that and did install the custom widget to my story. Any chance you have an example of how to connect the custom widget to the rest of the widgets on the story. I know theres a propery called onChange but i have limited experience with SAC

entry.title: Re: EC Job Info - custom field for Compensation portlet
entry.content:
You may not need a business rule .

Use this field (that you created in Job info) in the Dynamic group filter. Create a group for manager where the value of the field is yes. Assign it to a role which has access to comp info. Create another group for the people who have "no" as the value of the field and then assign it to a role that does not have access to comp info.

Regards,

Sharath

entry.title: Re: BW4HANA Views catalog
entry.content:
I think you can use SQL statements like:

SELECT * 
FROM "_SYS_BI"."BIMC_DIMENSION_VIEW" AS t1
JOIN "SYS"."VIEW_COLUMNS" AS t2 ON t2.schema_name = '_SYS_BIC'
AND t2.view_name LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',t1.cube_name),'%')
AND t2.column_name = t1.column_name
ORDER BY t1.catalog_name, t1.schema_name, t1.cube_name, "ORDER"

to get the list of fields for HANA CV-s.

entry.title: SAP Logon can't be started correctly - SAPUILandscape.xml - environment variable SAPLOGON_LSXML_FILE
entry.content:
I have a user who gets this error every time they restart or shut down their laptop:

SAP Logon cannot be started correctly.

Error while loading configuration file:

*redacted*\SAPUILandscape.xml

defined by environment variable SAPLOGON_LSXML_FILE

Adjust the input file name and ensure that the file is available and has the correct format

Just trying to figure out how to resolve this error every time they restart their laptop. Admittedly, I'm new to supporting SAP, so any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field in request material mdg fiori...
entry.content: The SAP Fiori app to request material is described in SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: Re: automatic insertion of a onbordee by integration in O...
entry.content:
Hi ,

 You can use APIs to create onboardees

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/ae335af892544b29b79040c23606bef3.html

after this you need to create all Employee Central entities (PerPerson, EmpJob, EmpEmployment) 

Then use the below API.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/44993f620a224c9f861170d79ef768c1.html

 

some example in the IDP document also

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/yp9xH3u

Regards,

Sharath

entry.title: Re: EC Job Info - custom field for Compensation portlet
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your feedback. The idea is that we are using that field in Job Info and if an employee becomes a manager the value from the field will change too. Is possible to have a business rule?

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA
entry.content:
Hello Leena,

I understand that you want to create a task in SAP Cloud ALM through API. To do this you can use SAP Cloud ALM Task API which is documented here: https://api.sap.com/api/CALM_TKM/resource/Tasks

You should call this REST API with OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials flow (client id, client secret).

How to call this REST API depends "where" is your client ; If the client is Jira, then you must check Jira documentation. 

Regards,

Cyril

entry.title: Re: Correct amortization passed mistakenly on an auc
entry.content: Hi Ryszard, Thank you for your answer. What do you mean by "finish configuration"?

entry.title: Re: Info for solution manager API
entry.content: Would it be possible to integrate Solman and Prometheus or Grafana via an API? Thinking about observability and monitoring.

entry.title: Re: 3244147 - How to retrieve the classification data fro...
entry.content:
Hi Tom,

Pass batch number to I_BATCHDISTINCT  and get "clfObjectInternalID" . Use I_BatchDistinct  & "I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate" with join on "ClfnObjectInternalID" and you will get Characteristic values. You can apply filter on the "CharcInternalID" to get exact characteristic value.

Hope, this will resolve your problem.

entry.title: Re: Initial filter parameters in Fiori Elemenets
entry.content: Is it possible to do something similar with links on notification emails?

entry.title: Re: Error 403 when calling Process Automation API on deployed SAP Build App
entry.content:
Hi Dinu, thanks for your information.

I've set the API path in the destination and choosed this destination on the SAP Build App.
The API path is https://<xxx>.hana.ondemand.com/workflow/rest/v1/workflow-instances
The Token URL is https://<xxx>.authentication.<xxx>.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token 

The payload looks good. I can copy it direct to postman and it works. The response just says error 403 - forbidden

My Client Secret and Client ID is also correct.

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @rmnachi_kx @christoph_pohl 

Today i had the same problem you mentioned. Looking, i think it may be because the Credential Store instance is not configured in the subaccount. It's the only thing I can think of.

Do you have the credential store configured?

Greetings and thanks

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@MioYasutake 

Have you tried to deploy your form in a BPA with the Northwind service? Does the service still work for you? Our service works just fine when running it locally, but as soon as we deploy it, add it to our automation and run the process. The service call doesn't happen.

entry.title: Re: Set up SAP Generative AI Hub in an SAP BTP Enterprise Account and Consume Generative AI Model
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for this informative post!

May I check if there is a possibility to train the generative AI model created in SAP Generative AI Hub in SAP AI core?

entry.title: Re: How can I retrieve specific Sybase Open Client versio...
entry.content:
NOTE: An EBF number is tied to a specific product, release version, chip/architecture and OS (eg, EBF28824 == SDK 16.0 SP03 PL07 for Linux x86 64bit). You may want to update the question to include the additional details.

A few suggestions, some of which you may have already tried (?):

  • if EBF29893 refers to SDK 16.0 versions SP03 PL13-PL14 or SP04 PL02-PL05 then you may find your desired download at SAP's Free Trials and Downloads page (pay close attention to each download's OS, chip/architecture and whether 32-bit vs 64-bit)
  • if you have an active tech support contract with SAP then you may be able to open a case and receive a one-off link to the desired download
  • contact the third party software company's tech support to see if they can provide the desired download

-------------------------

re: We tried using the latest version provided by SAP EBF30634 but it seems to crash the system

It's not mentioned in the question so one (obvious?) question ... have you verified EBF30634 is for your specific chip/architecture and OS (eg, HP-UX on IA64 64-bit)?

entry.title: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Parameters in Fiori Elements?
entry.content:
We are sending notification emails to users based on conditions. One of them is a date, with the value as current date.

Users get a link in the email that they can use to launch the report. Is it possible to set the values of the filters of the filter bar using URL parameters, especially if we need dynamic values?

We are using a List Report template, with SAP UI5 v1.96

entry.title: How long do I need to wait for a blog post that I submitted for review in Data and Analytics group?
entry.content:
I submitted a blog post here in Data and Analytics group yesterday. How long do I need to wait for a blog post that I submitted for review in Data and Analytics group? 

Interestingly I don't have it anywhere so I can track of it? Also could you please tell me where I can find my blog post which were submitted for review? 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for Configuring Address Fields in Cand...
entry.content:
Check the IDP 

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/fLUfJgQ/SAP%20SuccessFactors%20Recruiting%20Integration%20with%20Employee%20Central.pdf

Section 6.2

entry.title: Special characters not displayed correctly in SAP BO 4.3
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

in our SAP BusinessObjects 4.2 environment, we have some reports based on Oracle databases with special characters, for examples Å, which are displayed correctly.

When migrating these reports to version 4.3, the characters are no longer displayed and have been replaced by random symbols.

I applied the following configurations on the new environment, based on what was done in BO 4.2 and the SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002453422:

  • added <Parameter Name="Unicode">UTF8</Parameter> line in cs.cfg file
  • added <Parameter Name="Unicode">UTF8</Parameter> line in oracle.sbo file
  • modify Windows registry key NLS_LANG with value AMERICAN_AMERICA.AL32UTF8
  • change parameter UNICODE_STRINGS = Yes in Universe Parameters
  • install font "Arial Unicode MS"

I want to add that:

  • Oracle database connection was defined with Network Layer JDBC and Database Oracle 10 (specific version is 10g)
  • Oracle Client 19 is installed on server BO 4.3, while Oracle Client 11 is installed in BO 4.2

What could be the difference between the two versions in displaying special characters? What configuration might be missing? 

Thanks in advanced for replies.

Best regards,

Rossana

entry.title: Re: ABAP-Types with class
entry.content:
@JaschaS ,

In case of DDIC type, you may use CL_ABAP_ELEMDESCR->GET_DDIC_FIELD( )-DOMNAME

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
Hi Daniel

A couple of questions if I may.

Is there an easy way to go back to the main app page when you have navigated to another page in the SAP Build Apps viewer app? 

Also, is it possible to set US10 as the default logon tenant, instead of remembering to set this each time?

Thanks

entry.title: Prompt Input Getting #Error When Displayed in Report
entry.content:
I have a report for a client that needs to display dates that are derived from a prompt.

The variable to be displayed is: FormatDate(ToDate(UserResponse("Start Date");"dd/MM/yyyy hh:mm:ss");"M/d/yyyy")

When I view the report, the date is displayed correctly. When my client views the report, it is showing #Error. 

A few more notes:

  • I am located in US East Time zone
  • The client is US Central Time
  • I have logged in as the client while located both in East and Central time zones and there is no error when I view the report
  • I am on SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.2 Support Pack 8 Patch 7

SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI)

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
Hi Dinu,

Thank you for the reply,

When i tested with your code I am getting a different result, please see the screen shot

First context should repeat it self based on second input count number

if count value in second context is 1 then repeat 1 time

if count value in second context is 5 then repeat 5 times

if count value in second context is 3 then repeat 3 times

Thanks

entry.title: Need to add custom fields in Report RMSRVPO1 ( Tcode ME2S ) in the Output
entry.content:
I used the BADI ME_CHANGE_OUTTAB_CUS for enhancement reports ME28, ME2L or ME2N. But i must add an z field in me2s transaction, the isue is this badi is not working for this transaction me2s, how can expand the report?

I test me2s with this settings but is not working , thanks!!
